Might have mischaracterised him

You can't even remember what lead to this, one second you were in your room playing Phighting (instead of studying like you promised yourself you would...) and the next? You find yourself waking up to the sound of loud chatter and clinking glasses. Looking around, you start to recognise features about the people around you.

Horns...gears...wait...that sounds familiar...

you're in phighting now??? Now what? You can't even escape, you already see someone coming closer to you. Good luck.
